aboutOrion.title: What is Orion One?
aboutOrion.origin: Built on the foundation of Projeto Yara — a robotic neurosurgery assistance system currently in regulatory review — Orion One applies over 6 years of surgical research to precision veterinary medicine.
aboutOrion.p1: Orion One is a state-of-the-art surgical neuronavigation system designed specifically for veterinary medicine. It acts as a "GPS for the surgeon," allowing them to visualize the exact position of instruments in real-time on the patient's CT or MRI scans.
aboutOrion.p2: This technology transforms complex procedures into safer, faster, and minimally invasive surgeries, dramatically raising the standard of care and improving outcomes for neurosurgeries and precision orthopedics.

modules.title: Choose the module for your specialty

brain.tagline: Navigate every neuron with millimetric precision.
brain.f2: CT and MRI fusion for complete planning
brain.f3: Fiducial + surface registration with high accuracy

zenith.title: Zenith: Total Immersion in Surgery
zenith.tagline: The microscope adapter for 3D glasses that transforms how you see the surgical field.
zenith.description: Zenith connects your surgical microscope to 3D reality glasses, delivering an immersive experience with real depth of field. More comfort, more precision, more freedom of movement.

pillar1.title: Real Depth of Field
pillar1.p: Visualize anatomical structures in real stereoscopic 3D, with natural depth perception that boosts your confidence in every movement.

pillar2.title: Superior Ergonomics
pillar2.p: Free yourself from the microscope's fixed position. With 3D glasses, operate with freedom of movement and comfort during long procedures.

pillar3.title: Universal Compatibility
pillar3.p: Designed to integrate with the main surgical microscopes on the market, with no need to replace your existing equipment.

card1.title: Image Fusion
card1.p: Combine images from different modalities (CT, MRI) into a single view, providing a more complete and accurate picture of the patient's anatomy.

card2.title: Real-Time Tracking
card2.p: Track the exact position of your surgical instruments on the 3D model and in 2D views, ensuring precise and safe approaches.

card3.title: Advanced Planning
card3.p: Plan complex surgical approaches with millimeter precision, using intelligent segmentations that optimize the surgical outcome.

card4.title: Intuitive & Compatible Interface
card4.p: Developed with the surgeon in mind, Orion One features a clean interface and is compatible with major CT and MRI scanners on the market, facilitating seamless integration into your workflow.

card5.title: Customizable Instruments
card5.p: Easily register and calibrate your own surgical instruments, offering full flexibility to adapt to your techniques and preferences.

card6.title: Dedicated Support and Training
card6.p: Rely on our team of specialists for comprehensive training and ongoing support, ensuring you get the most out of Orion One.

card1.title: CT Scan Definition
card1.p: Import and process high-resolution CT scan images to obtain a detailed 3D model of the patient's spine for planning each step of the surgery.

card2.title: Real-Time Tracking
card2.p: Track the exact position of surgical instruments relative to the vertebrae in real time, ensuring precise and minimally invasive approaches.

card3.title: Advanced Planning with Screw Planning
card3.p: Virtually plan the trajectory and positioning of each pedicle screw before surgery, reducing risks and optimizing clinical outcomes.

card4.title: Personalized Instruments
card4.p: Calibrate and use your own instruments and implants, adapting the system to your technical preferences and your surgical team's protocols.

card5.title: Dedicated Support
card5.p: Our team of specialists provides comprehensive training and continuous support, ensuring you get the most out of the Orion One Spine module.

step1.title: Import the Image
step1.p: Load the patient's CT or MRI scans into the system with just a few clicks.
step1.detailed_p: Import the exam easily: just drag the file onto the screen, and all views, including the patient's 3D model, will be loaded instantly.

step2.title: Plan the Surgery
step2.p: Use the 3D model to define trajectories, mark targets, and simulate the procedure before the first incision.
step2.detailed_p: The GuideOs platform offers exclusive planning tools. Perform measurements, set angles, draw contours, and segment structures with high precision to optimize and streamline the surgical procedure.

step3.title: Perform Registration
step3.p: Correlate the patient's anatomy on the surgical table with the 3D model, ensuring the system's accuracy.
step3.detailed_p: Registration for neurosurgery is a two-step process: first, capture 3 fiducial points on both the patient and the scan. Then, a surface registration with 10 random points in the area of interest refines the system's accuracy.

step4.title: Start Navigating
step4.p: Perform the surgery with the confidence of seeing the exact position of your instruments in real-time.
step4.detailed_p: Navigate in real-time with 6 simultaneous views (3D, Parallel, Orthogonal, Axial, Coronal, and Sagittal) for superior spatial awareness. Use real-time segmentation to easily identify anatomical structures of interest.

step1.title: Import the CT Scan
step1.p: Load the patient's spinal CT scan and obtain a complete 3D model of the vertebrae.
step1.detailed_p: Import the exam easily: drag the file onto the screen and all vertebral views, including the 3D model, will be loaded instantly for planning.

step2.title: Plan the Screws
step2.p: Virtually define the pedicle screw trajectories with precise angulation and depth.
step2.detailed_p: Use the Orion Spine planning tools to virtually position each screw, check safety distances, and optimize the surgical strategy before the first incision.

step3.title: Perform Registration
step3.p: Correlate the spinal anatomy on the surgical table with the 3D model, ensuring millimetric accuracy.
step3.detailed_p: Registration for spinal surgery correlates anatomical landmarks of the vertebrae with the 3D model quickly and accurately, ensuring millimetric navigation throughout the entire procedure.

step4.title: Navigate Safely
step4.p: Perform screw insertion with the confidence of seeing the exact position of your instruments in real time.
step4.detailed_p: Navigate in real time following the planned trajectories, with simultaneous multi-view visualization to confirm the perfect positioning of each vertebral implant.

testimonials.title: What Those Who Trust Orion One Have to Say

card1.p: "Beyond more effective, safer, and precise procedures, it allows us to do things that were previously unthinkable. Additionally, many of our patients now have a much better and faster recovery."
card1.author: - Dr. Ricardo Shimizu, VEROS Veterinary Hospital, SP.

card2.p: "Orion made it easier for us to achieve more successful and targeted surgical resections, thus avoiding serious injuries to patients."
card2.author: - Dr. Ayanne Fireman, Maceió, AL.

card3.p: "It was a game-changer when we started using BMT's neuronavigator. With Orion, it became much easier to locate lesions, whether extra-axial or intra-axial, which we used to have great difficulty locating."
card3.author: - Dr. Felipe Purcell, Iconvet Bahia, Salvador

demoOrion.accessH2: Two ways to bring Orion One to your clinic
demoOrion.accessSub: Each model was designed for a different clinic profile. During the demo, we present the investment details for each option.

access1.title: Annual Lease
access1.p: Pay per surgery performed with the system, with a guaranteed minimum monthly fee. Ideal for clinics that want to incorporate the technology without a high initial investment — and charge for a differentiated service from day one.

access2.title: Direct Purchase
access2.p: Acquire the system with full ownership. No recurring contract dependency, no fee per surgery. The choice of surgical centers with high procedure volume that want to maximize return on investment.

demoOrion.accessCtaNote: Investment values for each model are presented during the demo — schedule below and find out which fits best with your clinic.

faq1.q: Does Orion One work with my CT scanner?
faq1.a: Yes. Orion One imports images in DICOM format, the universal standard for all CT scanners and MRI machines on the market. No special integration or equipment replacement is needed.

faq2.a: Orion One was designed to have a short learning curve. We provide comprehensive training for all clients and ongoing support from the BMT team. Most surgeons operate independently after the first in-person training.

faq3.a: Orion One is currently available for neurosurgery (Orion Brain) and spinal surgery (Orion Spine). The module for hip surgeries (Orion Hip) is in development and will be launched soon.

faq4.q: Does the demo have any cost?
faq4.a: None. The demo is completely free and no-commitment. You'll see the system live and talk directly with a BMT specialist — no sales pressure.

demoZenith.title: Zenith Demo | BMT
demoZenith.heroH1: See the surgical field like never before.
demoZenith.heroH2: Real depth of field in stereoscopic 3D — without replacing your microscope. See Zenith live in an exclusive demo.
demoZenith.guarantee: Google Meet · No commitment · Cancel with 1 click
demoZenith.proofLabel: Developed by BMT — same technology as Orion One

preview1.title: The system in action
preview1.p: Real videos of surgeons operating with Zenith — the 3D glasses in use, the 3D vision from 4K cameras and the freedom of movement the system provides.

preview2.title: Installation and connectivity
preview2.p: How the adapter fits your microscope, how WiFi recording works and real-time streaming to laptop, phone and external platforms.

preview3.title: Your questions answered
preview3.p: Compatibility with your microscope, ergonomics, training, investment and everything about the direct sale — with a BMT specialist, no filters.

pillar1.title: 3D Vision with 4K Cameras
pillar1.p: Two 4K cameras inside the adapter replicate the surgeon's binocular vision and project onto the two screens of the 3D glasses — real depth of field, no digital tricks.

pillar2.title: Freedom and Physical Health
pillar2.p: Zenith frees the surgeon from the microscope. No more fixed position at the eyepiece — operate with natural posture, protecting your spine and neck during long procedures.

pillar3.title: Real-Time Streaming
pillar3.p: Stream the surgical view in real time to laptop, phone and external platforms via WiFi. Ideal for remote training, remote supervision and live classes directly from the operating room.

pillar4.title: Recording and WiFi Download
pillar4.p: Record every surgery in 4K directly on the adapter and download via WiFi. Case documentation, clinical archive and teaching material — no cables, no hassle.

demoZenith.accessSub: Zenith is sold exclusively through direct sale. No recurring contracts, no fee per surgery — you buy the system and it's yours.
demoZenith.accessCardP: Acquire the Zenith adapter with 3D glasses and have full ownership of the system. Use it in as many surgeries as you want, no per-procedure cost, no annual renewals. Investment and conditions are presented during the demo.
demoZenith.accessCtaNote: Investment amount is presented during the demo — schedule below.

faq1.q: Does Zenith work with my microscope?
faq1.a: Zenith was designed for universal compatibility with the main surgical microscopes on the market. During the demo we verify exact compatibility with your model — if there is any exception, you'll know before making any decision.

faq2.a: The Zenith adapter has two 4K cameras positioned at the microscope's binocular, replicating the stereoscopic view of each eye. Images are transmitted in real time to the 3D glasses, which have two independent screens — one per eye — generating real depth of field without digital tricks.

faq3.q: Do I need to replace my current microscope?
faq3.a: No. Zenith is an adapter — it integrates with your existing microscope. No replacement needed, no major renovations to the operating room.

faq4.q: Does the demo have any cost?
faq4.a: None. The demo is completely free and no-commitment. You'll see Zenith live and talk directly with a BMT specialist — no sales pressure.
